NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FILED BY PLAINTIFF HARVEST CREDIT MANAGEMENT VII LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF FIA CARD SERVICES N.A. HEARING SET FOR JUL-24-2012 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE MATTER WAS DISCUSSED. AFTER HEARING, THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT RHONDA THOMAS-SMITH'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED EXCEPT TO THE EXTENT OF $50.00 PER MONTH. THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO GARNISH $50.00 PER MONTH AS PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT AND TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE: CURTIS E.A. KARNOW; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jul-24-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Rhonda Thomas-Smith, Tel. 415.515.6829, defendant/claimant appearing on her own behalf;
No other appearance.

The matter was discussed. After hearing, the court vacated its tentative ruling. Defendant Rhonda Thomas-Smith's Claim Of Exemption is granted except to the extent of $50.00 per month. The levying officer is directed to garnish $50.00 per month as payment on the judgment and to release any earnings held to the judgment debtor. Order signed. Judge: Curtis E.A. Karnow; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
